HALF 10 DEATH DAILY BY CE


Chief Stewards way-the billy
club way--is simple. A big police
sergeant from the Harrison street
station takes a squad of police. and
they wait until meal time comes.
The sergeant knows then that the
work seekers will be driven by
hunger to wait at the very doors of
the labor agents.


Then the sqHad starts. Their at
tack is systematic but simple,
There Is no resistance. The hun
CRY men don't dare mutter. even.
for in nine cases out of 10 their
pockets are empty. A growl from
the sergeant. a chorus of commands
from the harsh threats of the pc.
licemen, clubs fly, heads are bat
tered and half shod feet patter
down the sidewalks in a path OF
distress.


This is the logical" kind Of re-
form that prevents poverty, bo-
cause 1t keeps poverty from show
Ing its face.


On the vagrancy report which the
police now are required to fill out,
there is blank which calls for the
previous occupation of the men
who are being experimental on
with billy club reform.


'Never known to work" is writ
